subcodes.first_line: Glory be to Thee, O my God! This is one of Thy handmaidens who hath turned her face towards the sanctuary of recognition in Thy days
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی هذه امه من امائک التی اقبلت الی کعبه العرفان فی ایامک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for protection
